ham.subject: Transaction Alert: ₹15,000 Debit from Your Account on 07/04/2026
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Gupta,

We hope you are doing well. This is a notification from State Bank of India regarding a recent transaction on your account (Account No: 1234567890).

Date: 07 Apr 2026
Description: ATM Withdrawal
Amount: ₹15,000
Balance after transaction: ₹85,000

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our customer care immediately at 1800-123-456 or visit the nearest branch.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
SBIN Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Overdue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello Ravi,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to inform you that an invoice from QuickBooks/Norton for the month of March 2026 is still pending payment. As per our records, the amount of ₹25,000 was due on 01/04/2026.

Please log in to your QuickBooks account at <URL> and submit the payment immediately to avoid any late fees or service interruptions. If you do not process this payment within 48 hours, your account will be suspended.

For your reference, here are the invoice details:

Invoice No: QB-INV-2026-003
Date Issued: 15 Mar 2026
Due Date: 01 Apr 2026
Amount: ₹25,000

If you have already paid, kindly send the payment receipt to this email. If you need assistance, reply to this message or call our support at 1800-987-654.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best Regards,

Shalini Sharma
Accounts Manager
QuickBooks/Norton
